bonuses.stat:
While in combat, you gain one of five random Major buffs which changes every 10 seconds. Enemies within 12 meters of you gain one of five random Minor debuffs depending on which buff you have. The available effects are:

Major Berserk and Minor Maim
Major Resolve and Minor Breach
Major Force and Minor Brittle
Major Evasion and Minor Vulnerability
Major Courage and Minor Cowardice
